rationale: Review 2 correctly approves sound reuse, while Review 1's main actionable findings (deleting map_tmul/map_toAlgHom/antipode_tmul as Mathlib 'specializations') would strip the file's intentional simp API — these are needed because the local `map`/`includeRight` defs don't unfold automatically, so acting on them makes the PR worse; Review 1's only valid reuse point (private general helpers) is marginal and partly out-of-scope (upstreaming).
